text: Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich: There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Gaza that will expand our borders. There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Lebanon that will expand our borders, to the Litani [river], to defensible borders. There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Syria... the crown, the Hermon, and the Hauran at least...
text_zh: 以色列财政部长比撒列·斯莫特里赫：加沙将有一个最终的外交阶段，这将扩大我们的边界。黎巴嫩将有一个最终的外交阶段，这将把我们的边界扩大到利塔尼河，达到可防御的边界。叙利亚将有一个最终的外交阶段……至少是皇冠、赫尔蒙山和豪兰地区……

text: — ❗️ 🇵🇰 / 🇮🇱 Pakistan’s Minister of Defense: ‘Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and pray people who created this cancerous state on Palestinian land to get rid of European jews burn in hell.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇵🇰 / 🇮🇱 巴基斯坦国防部长：‘以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒。当伊斯兰堡正在进行和平谈判时，黎巴嫩正在发生种族灭绝。无辜的平民正在被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件持续不断。我希望并祈祷那些在巴勒斯坦土地上建立这个毒瘤国家以摆脱欧洲犹太人的人下地狱。’ @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Iran's Ghalibaf: Past experiences have shown us that we must have absolute distrust toward the enemy. America’s historic retreat and acceptance of the general framework of Iran’s 10-point plan is an undeniable victory — but we consider it an incomplete step. If the United States stops violating its commitments, negotiations may be possible.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：过去的经验告诉我们，我们必须对敌人保持绝对的不信任。美国历史性的退缩并接受伊朗10点计划的总框架是一个不可否认的胜利——但我们认为这是一个不完整的步骤。如果美国停止违反其承诺，谈判或许是可能的。

text: The U.S. has lost 24 MQ-9 Reaper drones in the Iran conflict (8 since April), totaling about $720 million. Source: CBS
text_zh: 美国在伊朗冲突中损失了24架MQ-9“死神”无人机（自4月以来损失了8架），总价值约7.2亿美元。来源：CBS

text: In 2020, Venezuela under Nicolás Maduro approved a plan to spend over $400 million to buy a ballistic missile system from Iran. The missiles could potentially have reached U.S. territory and would have been deployed on Venezuelan naval vessels. The deal ultimately did not go through after pressure from the Trump administration. Source: Politico
text_zh: 2020年，尼古拉斯·马杜罗领导下的委内瑞拉批准了一项计划，斥资超过4亿美元从伊朗购买弹道导弹系统。这些导弹可能触及美国领土，并会被部署在委内瑞拉海军舰艇上。在特朗普政府施压后，该交易最终未能达成。来源：Politico

text: 🇸🇾 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hamas called on Palestinians in Jerusalem and the occupied interior to flock to the Al-Aqsa Mosque after its reopening following over 40 days of occupation closure, urging Friday to be a day of renewed loyalty and protection for the mosque against occupation attempts to impose new Judaization realities, affirming that Al-Aqsa remains the title of the struggle. Hamas also mourned the mujahid martyr Alaa Khaled Subaih, who was martyred on Wednesday evening, April 9, 2026, by occupation gunfire while confronting settlers near an illegal outpost close to the village of Tayasir, east of Tubas.
text_zh: 🇸🇾 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 哈马斯呼吁耶路撒冷和被占领内陆的巴勒斯坦人在阿克萨清真寺被占领军关闭40多天后重新开放时涌向该清真寺，敦促将周五定为重申忠诚和保护清真寺的日子，以抵制占领者强加新的犹太化现实的企图，并申明阿克萨仍然是斗争的主题。哈马斯还哀悼了圣战烈士阿拉·哈立德·苏拜赫，他于2026年4月9日星期三晚上在图巴斯以东塔亚西尔村附近对抗定居者时，被占领军开枪打死。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 13: U.S. President Trump stated that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu supports the current ceasefire with Iran: "Netanyahu supports the deal; he's perfectly fine with it, excellent. We're going to have a very successful agreement; everything is going to work out very well." When asked about Lebanon, Trump commented on Netanyahu's approach: "Netanyahu will be fine. He'll slow things down a bit, lower his profile. He has an issue with Hezbollah. He'll ease off a little, but he's going to be absolutely fine." Regarding another possible visit to Israel, Trump said: "I will come to Israel at some point. I don't yet know whether I will attend the ceremony." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 以色列第13频道：美国总统特朗普表示，以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡支持目前与伊朗的停火协议：“内塔尼亚胡支持这项协议；他完全没问题，非常好。我们将达成一项非常成功的协议；一切都会进展得非常顺利。”当被问及黎巴嫩问题时，特朗普评论了内塔尼亚胡的做法：“内塔尼亚胡会没事的。他会放慢节奏，降低姿态。他在真主党问题上有些麻烦。他会稍微缓和一下，但他绝对会没事的。”关于是否会再次访问以色列，特朗普说：“我会在某个时候访问以色列。我还不知道是否会参加仪式。” @wfwitness

text: Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich: There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Gaza that will expand our borders. There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Lebanon that will expand our borders, to the Litani [river], to defensible borders. There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Syria... the crown, the Hermon, and the Hauran at least...
text_zh: 以色列财政部长比撒列·斯莫特里赫：加沙将有一个决定性的外交阶段，这将扩大我们的边界。黎巴嫩将有一个决定性的外交阶段，这将把我们的边界扩大到利塔尼河，达到可防御的边界。叙利亚将有一个决定性的外交阶段……至少包括皇冠、赫尔蒙山和豪兰地区……

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Trump says he’s “very optimistic” about a deal with Iran: They’re much more reasonable… they’re agreeing to what they have to. If they don’t make a deal, it’s going to be very painful. I spoke with Bibi. We have to be a little more low-key. Source: NBC
text_zh: 特朗普表示，他对与伊朗达成协议“非常乐观”：他们理智多了……他们正在同意他们必须同意的事情。如果他们不达成协议，那将是非常痛苦的。我和比比谈过了。我们必须稍微低调一点。来源：NBC

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 BBC : The United States is planning to automatically register young men for military draft eligibility as early as December, ending decades of self‑registration. The change, approved by Congress in December, would apply to men aged 18‑25. Officials said it would save money and streamline the process, though some have expressed concern it could pave the way for a future draft. The White House has said conscription is not part of current plans. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 BBC：美国计划最早于12月自动为符合征兵条件的年轻男性进行登记，结束几十年来自行登记的做法。这项去年12月由国会批准的变更将适用于18至25岁的男性。官员们表示，这将节省资金并简化流程，尽管一些人担心这可能为未来的征兵铺平道路。白宫表示，征兵并不在目前的计划之内。 @wfwitness

text: The U.S. has lost 24 MQ-9 Reaper drones in the Iran conflict (8 since April), totaling about $720 million. Source: CBS
text_zh: 美国在伊朗冲突中损失了24架MQ-9“死神”无人机（自4月以来损失了8架），总价值约7.2亿美元。来源：CBS

text: OSINTdefender According to Reuters, citing three European diplomats, NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte has told his counterparts in NATO member states that U.S. President Donald J. Trump is looking for commitments to a Strait of Hormuz framework within days. One diplomat said “We note the frustration in Washington, but they did not consult allies either before or after starting this war.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据路透社援引三位欧洲外交官的消息，北约秘书长马克·吕特已告知北约成员国同行，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普正在寻求在几天内就霍尔木兹海峡框架做出承诺。一位外交官表示：“我们注意到了华盛顿的挫败感，但他们在发动这场战争之前或之后都没有咨询过盟友。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Senior Israeli official: We are open to negotiations, but it will be conducted under fire. The Lebanese government needs to prove that it is capable of succeeding where it has already failed. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列高级官员：我们对谈判持开放态度，但谈判将在炮火下进行。黎巴嫩政府需要证明它有能力在已经失败的地方取得成功。 推文

text: Open Source Intel NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte: "What I see when I look across Europe today, is allies providing a massive amount of support - basing, logistics, and other measures - to ensure the powerful US military succeeds in denying Iran a nuclear weapon and degrading its capacity to export chaos." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 北约秘书长马克·吕特：“当我审视今天的欧洲时，我看到盟友们提供了大量的支持——基地、后勤和其他措施——以确保强大的美军能够成功阻止伊朗获得核武器，并削弱其输出混乱的能力。” 推文

text: WarTranslated Occupied Oleshky, Kherson region. A Ukrainian serviceman uses a drone to film yet another city being destroyed by the Russians. https://www.instagram.com/reel/DW5X11DMcRM/?igsh=YWdsY3Zvd2h0a3Rj https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042289107519328367/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 赫尔松地区被占领的奥列什基。一名乌克兰军人使用无人机拍摄了又一座被俄罗斯人摧毁的城市。 https://www.instagram.com/reel/DW5X11DMcRM/?igsh=YWdsY3Zvd2h0a3Rj https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042289107519328367/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte: "What I see when I look across Europe today, is allies providing a massive amount of support - basing, logistics, and other measures - to ensure the powerful US military succeeds in denying Iran a nuclear weapon and degrading its capacity to export chaos." tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 北约秘书长马克·吕特：“当我审视今天的欧洲时，我看到盟友们提供了大量的支持——基地、后勤和其他措施——以确保强大的美军能够成功阻止伊朗获得核武器，并削弱其输出混乱的能力。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: The ceasefire was declared yesterday, but even before moving on to negotiations, the first problem immediately emerged. As expected, Israel acted as a spoiler and carried out a large-scale air operation against Lebanon, something that had not happened up until that point, causing the deaths of many civilians. Now, under the shadow of this provocation by Israel, the negotiations that are supposed to continue will naturally be very difficult. I would like to remind you that the issues to be discussed are extremely complex. Many of these topics have already been debated frequently in previous talks between the United States and Iran. However, even now, we can see that there are still fluctuations and uncertainties, particularly regarding enrichment. The nuclear issue remains the most heavily debated topic, and even there, differences of opinion may persist. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：停火协议昨天已经宣布，但在进入谈判之前，第一个问题就立即出现了。正如预期的那样，以色列充当了破坏者，对黎巴嫩进行了大规模的空中行动，这是此前从未发生过的事情，导致了许多平民死亡。现在，在以色列这种挑衅行为的阴影下，本应继续进行的谈判自然会非常困难。我想提醒大家，要讨论的问题极其复杂。其中许多议题在美伊之前的会谈中已经频繁讨论过。然而，即使是现在，我们仍然可以看到波动和不确定性，特别是在浓缩问题上。核问题仍然是争论最激烈的话题，即使在那里，意见分歧也可能持续存在。 推文

text: WarMonitor House Democrats tried to force a vote to stop Trump’s Iran war, but the GOP-led session was abruptly gaveled closed before Rep. Glenn Ivey could even introduce the resolution. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 众议院民主党人试图强行投票以阻止特朗普的伊朗战争，但共和党领导的会议在格伦·艾维（Glenn Ivey）众议员甚至还没来得及提出决议之前就突然敲槌休会了。推文

text: WarMonitor Reports like this keep surfacing, suggesting there’s a lot more they’re not telling us. SCOOP: The Pentagon failed to warn ships carrying supplies for the US military before starting the war in Iran. The ships got stuck in the Persian Gulf. And for a month, they were stuck w/ a group of college students — merchant marine cadets. https://www.notus.org/defense/us-cadets-vessels-stuck-persian-gulf-trump-bombing-iran-war - Anna Kramer tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 像这样的报道不断浮出水面，暗示还有很多事情他们没有告诉我们。独家报道：五角大楼在对伊朗发动战争前，未能向为美军运送物资的船只发出警告。这些船只被困在波斯湾。在一个月的时间里，他们与一群大学生——商船海事学员——被困在一起。https://www.notus.org/defense/us-cadets-vessels-stuck-persian-gulf-trump-bombing-iran-war - Anna Kramer 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @ZelenskyyUa : We cannot simply speak about withdrawing from Donbas as a matter of compromise. Our withdrawal from Donbas would open up opportunities for the Russian Federation to occupy our most fortified territories without losses. Some people say it would take a year to a year and a half to build new fortifications. But everyone forgets: first and foremost, that is a year and a half. And even if it were less, fortifications in an open field are a completely different matter from those in urban areas. They can never provide equally strong protection. A withdrawal would give the Russian Federation room for large-scale maneuver. They could advance either toward Kharkiv or toward Dnipro, destroying our cities. And two major cities would be at risk – cities that, incidentally, generate a significant share of our GDP. So many people have died there… The morale of our army would certainly decline. There would undoubtedly be a rift in society. The army – which would surely not support such steps – on one side, and society on the other. And division within society is precisely what Putin is aiming for. Moreover, there are currently 200,000 people living in the territories of Donbas that we are defending. Withdrawal does not mean preserving anything. You leave, and without any guarantees, you risk losing everything. And that is a major risk. From an interview with Rai Radio 1 (2/3). tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @ZelenskyyUa ：我们不能简单地把从顿巴斯撤军当作一种妥协。我们从顿巴斯撤军将使俄罗斯联邦有机会在毫无损失的情况下占领我们防御最严密的领土。有些人说，建立新的防御工事需要一年到一年半的时间。但每个人都忘了：首先，那是一年半的时间。即使时间更短，在开阔地带的防御工事与城市地区的防御工事完全是两码事。它们永远无法提供同样强大的保护。撤军将为俄罗斯联邦的大规模机动提供空间。他们可以向哈尔科夫或第聂伯罗推进，摧毁我们的城市。两座主要城市将面临风险——顺便提一下，这两座城市贡献了我们很大一部分GDP。那里已经有那么多人牺牲了……我们军队的士气肯定会下降。社会无疑会出现裂痕。军队——肯定不会支持这样的举措——站在一边，社会站在另一边。而社会内部的分裂正是普京的目标。此外，目前有20万民众生活在我们正在保卫的顿巴斯领土上。撤军并不意味着保全任何东西。你离开了，在没有任何保证的情况下，你就有失去一切的风险。这是一个巨大的风险。摘自接受Rai Radio 1采访（2/3）。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran FM: 'Netanyahu's criminal trial resumes on Sun. A region-wide ceasefire, incl in Lebanon, would hasten his jailing. If the U S. wishes to crater its economy by letting Netanyahu kill diplomacy, that would ultimately be its choice. We think that would be dumb but are prepared for it.' tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗外长：“内塔尼亚胡的刑事审判将于周日恢复。包括黎巴嫩在内的地区停火将加速他入狱。如果美国希望通过让内塔尼亚胡扼杀外交来摧毁其经济，那最终是它自己的选择。我们认为那很愚蠢，但已做好准备。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese officials tell Al-Arabi Al-Jadid no date has been set for talks with Israel, with former ambassador Simon Kerem leading the delegation. Axios: Israeli official: "No ceasefire in Lebanon. The negotiations with the Lebanese government will begin in the coming days" - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩官员告诉《新阿拉伯人报》（Al-Arabi Al-Jadid），与以色列的会谈尚未确定日期，前大使西蒙·凯雷姆（Simon Kerem）将率领代表团。Axios：以色列官员：“黎巴嫩不会停火。与黎巴嫩政府的谈判将在未来几天开始” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Benjamin Netanyahu: 📌 “In response to Lebanon’s repeated requests for direct talks, I have ordered that negotiations begin as soon as possible, focusing on Hezbollah’s disarmament and establishing peaceful relations between Israel and Lebanon. Israel also welcomes the Lebanese prime minister’s call for the demilitarization of Beirut.” 🟥 An Israeli official told Axios that a ceasefire in Lebanon is not being considered, and talks with the Lebanese government will begin in the coming days. 🔹 Direct negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are expected to start next week, with the first meeting scheduled in Washington at the State Department. The U.S. side will be led by Ambassador to Lebanon Michelle Issa, Israel by Ambassador Yehiel Leiter, and Lebanon by Ambassador Nada Mouwad. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231t tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇮🇱 🇱🇧 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡：📌 “针对黎巴嫩多次提出的直接会谈请求，我已下令尽快开始谈判，重点是解除真主党的武装并建立以色列与黎巴嫩之间的和平关系。以色列也欢迎黎巴嫩总理关于贝鲁特非军事化的呼吁。” 🟥 一位以色列官员告诉Axios，黎巴嫩停火不在考虑范围内，与黎巴嫩政府的谈判将在未来几天开始。 🔹 以色列与黎巴嫩之间的直接谈判预计将于下周开始，首次会议定于华盛顿的国务院举行。美方将由驻黎巴嫩大使米歇尔·伊萨（Michelle Issa）领导，以色列方由大使耶希尔·莱特（Yehiel Leiter）领导，黎巴嫩方由大使娜达·穆瓦德（Nada Mouwad）领导。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231t 推文

text: Nuno Felix You like transactional? Here goes transactional EU foreign affairs chief @kajakallas tells @BeckyCNN that accusations that Europe has not done enough to support them throughout the war with Iran are “unfair.” "We have Russia’s war going on for four years, we haven’t seen really the Gulf countries helping us there." https://twitter.com/cnnipr/status/2042246199084757333/video/1 - CNN International PR tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 你喜欢交易式的吗？交易式的来了。欧盟外交政策负责人 @kajakallas 告诉 @BeckyCNN，关于欧洲在伊朗战争期间对他们支持不够的指责是“不公平的”。“俄罗斯的战争已经持续了四年，我们并没有真正看到海湾国家在这方面帮助我们。” https://twitter.com/cnnipr/status/2042246199084757333/video/1 - CNN国际公关推文

text: Nuno Felix https://x.com/cnnipr/status/2042246199084757333/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix https://x.com/cnnipr/status/2042246199084757333/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Zelensky: 📌 “We cannot even consider withdrawing from Donbas as a compromise. Leaving would allow Russia to occupy our most fortified positions without losses.” 📌 “Some say new fortifications can be built in a year or a year and a half, but that time matters. And even then, defenses in open terrain can never match the strength of those we have in Donbas.” 📌 “A withdrawal would open the way for large-scale Russian maneuvers, potentially toward Kharkiv or Dnipro, leading to the destruction of our cities. It would threaten major urban centers that generate a significant share of our GDP, lower troop morale, and create division within society — something Putin is aiming for.” 📌 “Additionally, around 200,000 people currently live in the areas we are defending. Leaving does not guarantee safety — it risks losing everything without assurances.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 泽连斯基：📌 “我们甚至不能考虑将撤出顿巴斯作为一种妥协。离开将使俄罗斯能够在没有损失的情况下占领我们防御最严密的阵地。” 📌 “有人说一年或一年半内可以建立新的防御工事，但时间至关重要。即便如此，开阔地带的防御也永远无法与我们在顿巴斯的防御强度相提并论。” 📌 “撤军将为俄罗斯的大规模机动打开道路，可能指向哈尔科夫或第聂伯罗，导致我们的城市被摧毁。这将威胁到产生我们大部分GDP的主要城市中心，降低军队士气，并在社会内部制造分裂——这正是普京的目标。” 📌 “此外，目前约有20万人居住在我们正在防御的地区。离开并不能保证安全——这冒着失去一切且没有任何保障的风险。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarTranslated UK Defence Secretary John Healey has revealed that RF conducted a secret underwater operation in British waters. Over the course of a month, the UK and its allies tracked a Kremlin attack submarine and two spy submersibles in the North Sea before they retreated. "To President Putin, I say: we see you, we see your activity over our cables and pipelines, and you should know that any attempt to damage them will not be tolerated and will have serious consequences." - Healey said. https://www.telegraph.co.uk/politics/2026/04/09/john-healey-defence-press-conference-russia-tankers-chanel/ tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 英国国防大臣约翰·希利透露，俄罗斯联邦在英国水域进行了一次秘密水下行动。在一个月的时间里，英国及其盟友在北海追踪了一艘克里姆林宫的攻击潜艇和两艘间谍潜水器，随后它们撤退了。“我对普京总统说：我们看到了你，我们看到了你在我们的电缆和管道上的活动，你应该知道，任何破坏它们的企图都不会被容忍，并将产生严重后果。” - 希利说道。 https://www.telegraph.co.uk/politics/2026/04/09/john-healey-defence-press-conference-russia-tankers-chanel/ 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @yasminalombaert : Journalist Michael Weiss pulled back the curtain on what’s actually happening in Budapest. While U.S. VP JD Vance was campaigning for Viktor Orbán, Michael revealed that Russian GRU spies are in the background, pulling the strings of the local disinformation machine. The scary part? Vance is repeating their lines word-for-word. The Narrative: Ukraine is the bad guy. The Goal: Disrupt the West and help the Kremlin. The Cost: Truth and national security. Michael’s colleagues are already being targeted for exposing this. We can’t afford to look away. Watch the full breakdown in this clip. #Investigation #Truth #NewsAlert #JDVance #Budapest #Russia #Intelligence tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @yasminalombaert : 记者迈克尔·韦斯揭开了布达佩斯实际发生的事情的帷幕。当美国副总统JD·万斯为维克托·欧尔班竞选时，迈克尔透露俄罗斯格鲁乌（GRU）间谍在幕后操纵着当地的虚假信息机器。可怕的部分是什么？万斯逐字重复了他们的台词。叙事：乌克兰是坏人。目标：破坏西方并帮助克里姆林宫。代价：真相和国家安全。迈克尔的同事们已经因为揭露此事而成为目标。我们不能视而不见。观看此片段中的完整分析。#调查 #真相 #新闻快讯 #JDVance #布达佩斯 #俄罗斯 #情报 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said the Iranian nation changed the equation of power over the past 40 days since the death of the Supreme Leader. The ceasefire was the result of imposing Iran’s will on the enemy, which failed to bring the country to its knees. The decision to accept the truce was made with consensus under the leader’s guidance, based on dignity, wisdom and national interest – not weakness – to consolidate battlefield victories. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬表示，自最高领袖去世以来的过去40天里，伊朗民族改变了权力平衡。停火是伊朗将意志强加于敌人的结果，敌人未能使伊朗屈服。接受停火的决定是在领袖的指导下，基于尊严、智慧和国家利益，经协商一致做出的，而非出于软弱，旨在巩固战场胜利。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷🇺🇸🇱🇧 Israel Hayom: Israel is considering halting its strikes in Lebanon and returning to the pre‑“Roaring Lion” operational posture to help the U.S. begin negotiations with Iran. The move would allow Israel to continue acting against immediate threats…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 i24NEWS: Israel has agreed to a U.S. request to refrain from conducting a “large” military operation in Lebanon, similar to yesterday’s strikes in Beirut, over the next two weeks. Fighting will continue at a regular level alongside negotiations. The cabinet had disagreements last night over how to act in Lebanon in light of the American request, but the decision was made to comply. @wfwitness

text: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: Netanyahu's criminal trial resumes on Sun. A region-wide ceasefire, incl in Lebanon, would hasten his jailing. If the U.S. wishes to crater its economy by letting Netanyahu kill diplomacy, that would ultimately be its choice. We think that would be dumb but are prepared for it.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐：内塔尼亚胡的刑事审判将于周日恢复。包括黎巴嫩在内的地区停火将加速他入狱。如果美国希望通过让内塔尼亚胡扼杀外交来摧毁其经济，那最终将是它自己的选择。我们认为这很愚蠢，但已为此做好了准备。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 Iran’s foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei strongly condemned "Israeli crimes" in Lebanon and praised the Lebanese people’s legendary resistance. He stated that a ceasefire in Lebanon is an inseparable part of the Pakistan‑proposed truce, and that the US committed to stopping the war on all fronts. Any action contrary to this constitutes a breach of U.S. obligations. Any talks on ending the war are contingent on US fulfilment of its ceasefire commitments on all fronts, including Lebanon. The timing and composition of Iran’s delegation for proposed talks in Islamabad are still being reviewed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊强烈谴责以色列在黎巴嫩的“罪行”，并赞扬了黎巴嫩人民的传奇抵抗。他表示，黎巴嫩停火是巴基斯坦提议的休战协议中不可分割的一部分，美国承诺停止各条战线的战争。任何违背此举的行为都构成对美国义务的违反。任何关于结束战争的谈判都取决于美国履行其在包括黎巴嫩在内的所有战线的停火承诺。伊朗代表团参加拟议伊斯兰堡会谈的时间和组成仍在审查中。 @wfwitness

text: ‏" علم الله ما خطر في بالنا ضرب الأبراج، ولكن بعدما طفح الكيل وشاهدنا الظلم وتعسف التحالف الأميركي الإسرائيلي على أهلنا في فلسطين ولبنان تبادر إلى ذهني ذلك. وإن الأحداث التي أثرت في نفسي بشكل مباشر ترجع إلى عام 1982 وما تلاها من أحداث عندما أذنت أمريكا للإسرائيليين باجتياح لبنان وساعد في ذلك الأسطول السادس الأميركي، وبدأ القصف وقتل وجرح كثيرون وروع وشرد آخرون، ومازلت أتذكر تلك المشاهد المؤثرة.. دماء وأشلاء وأطفال ونساء صرعى في كل مكان، منازل تدمر بمن فيها وأبراج تدك على ساكنيها، وكان العالم كله يسمع ويرى ولا يزيد. وفي تلك اللحظات العصيبة جاشت في نفسي معان كثيرة يصعب وصفها، ولكنها أنتجت شعورا عارما يرفض الظلم وولدت تصميما قويًا على معاقبة الظالمين. وبينما أنا أنظر إلى تلك الأبراج المدمرة في لبنان انقدح في ذهني أن نعاقب الظالم بالمثل وأن ندمر أبراجًا في أمريكا لتذوق بعض ما ذقنا ولترتدع عن قتل أطفالنا ونسائنا، فتأكد لي يومها أن الظلم وقتل الأبرياء من الأطفال والنساء عن عمد قانون أميركي معتمد، - أسامة.
text_zh: “真主知道，袭击大楼从未出现在我们的脑海中，但在忍无可忍，目睹了美以联盟对我们在巴勒斯坦和黎巴嫩的同胞所施加的不公与暴行后，这个念头浮现在我的脑海中。直接影响我的事件可以追溯到1982年及随后的日子，当时美国允许以色列人入侵黎巴嫩，美国第六舰队提供了协助。轰炸开始了，许多人被杀害和受伤，其他人被恐吓和流离失所。我至今仍记得那些令人心碎的场景……到处都是鲜血、残肢、死去的妇女和儿童，房屋连同里面的人一起被摧毁，大楼被夷为平地。全世界都在听、在看，却无动于衷。在那些艰难的时刻，我心中涌现出许多难以言表的感受，但它们产生了一种强烈的拒绝不公的情绪，并诞生了惩罚压迫者的坚定决心。当我看着黎巴嫩那些被摧毁的大楼时，我脑海中闪过一个念头：以牙还牙，惩罚压迫者，摧毁美国的大楼，让他们尝尝我们所经历的部分痛苦，从而阻止他们杀害我们的妇女和儿童。那天我确信，不公和蓄意杀害无辜的妇女和儿童是美国认可的法律。”——奥萨马。
